title: Email - Tasks due (PM, Reporting, Tracking)

posts.author: ADamian (Azahara SD)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I used to work with “Planner” (Office Package) and there was a feature I really miss in Monday, please.

My team and I received daily emails with lists of “Late Tasks”, “Due Today”, and “Upcoming”. On each task, you could find a quick summary with the title and deadline. If you click on them, you get redirected to the board where that task is allocated.

As a project manager, this is a super useful way to track projects and tasks. And make any necessary changes according to upcoming deliveries.

Please, Could you develop this feature?

Thank you.
KR,

Tasks Due647×622 51.5 KB

posts.author: CKC183 (CKC)
posts.cookedHtml: I had this in Asana and it’s the one thing I really miss from that system.
